context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 27
WINDOW: 474.200s to 510.000s (smile at 494.200s to 495.000s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[434.930-494.610] interviewee: tells me, here is your pass. And somebody in front is waiting for you. I go to the gate and an older man. But I recognize right away he was not dressed like a European, like an American-- like clothes, fancy.
[494.610-518.200] interviewee: And he said, I'm your uncle. Now, this was in 1932. They came to visit us from the United States. And I took him out to the city. We went to eat. And we went to a Yiddish theatre with him. And we talked about what I'm doing

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
And

context_segments.text: tells me, here is your pass. And somebody in front is waiting for you. I go to the gate and an older man. But I recognize right away he was not dressed like a European, like an American-- like clothes, fancy.

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: And he said, I'm your uncle. Now, this was in 1932. They came to visit us from the United States. And I took him out to the city. We went to eat. And we went to a Yiddish theatre with him. And we talked about what I'm doing
